arts.ttl: 'Mid-table mindset' - Tom Cleverley's Watford blast after Preston loss ahead of Middlesbrough - Teesside Live
arts.sum: Tom Cleverley accused his Watford players of having a 'mid-table mindset' as he demanded a reaction against Middlesbrough following the midweek defeat to Preston North End. That doesn't make Michael Carrick's former Manchester United team-mate feel much better though, as he made clear his expectations of his side in Saturday's game.

arts.ttl: Emmanuel Latte Lath Middlesbrough goals drought claim with Michael Carrick still encouraged
arts.sum: More importantly for Carrick though, the striker still made vital contributions in both games - with the Boro boss stressing the goals will come. Michael Carrick is convinced that the goals will come for Emmanuel Latte Lath, and has stressed the importance that the striker just keeps doing what he's doing - with his influence for Middlesbrough stretching beyond just his goals.

arts.ttl: ‘The promotion push starts now’ – Watford vs Middlesbrough prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Watford vs Middlesbrough prediction ahead of their Championship clash on Saturday afternoon. The post ‘The promotion push starts now’ – Watford vs Middlesbrough prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Hayden Hackney's recent Boro form can help him become the 'complete player'
arts.sum: It’s just what the team needs at the moment, especially as Jonny Howson is still working his way back from injury and Aidan Morris continues to get his feet under the table. While Boro are promising to start moving forward again, the one thing we need to see is Emmanuel Latte Lath getting back on the goals trail.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough promotion perception swayed in a big way by impressive West Brom victory
arts.sum: Middlesbrough's midweek win over league leaders West Brom had a huge sway in changing the outside perception of their promotion chances. That was reflected in betting data in the Championship too, with Boro's odds to win promotion slashed from 5/2 to 6/4, having started the season at 3/1.

arts.ttl: Watford vs Middlesbrough predictions: Buoyant Boro could be held
arts.sum: Watford take on Middlesbrough at Vicarage Road in the Championship on Saturday and Dan Childs expects a tight encounter with the points likely to be shared.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's Morgan Rogers pride, post-Bayern text, England call and Middlesbrough benefit
arts.sum: While Rogers' exit was a little more fast-tracked than Boro would ideally like, Carrick still has immense pride in seeing Rogers' career go from strength to strength and revealed the text message he sent to the 22-year-old after Wednesday's game. While Boro would have ideally liked to have enjoyed Rogers' talents for longer, they profited greatly from his sale.

arts.ttl: Tough selection choices as Michael Carrick balances Middlesbrough momentum switch with workload
arts.sum: Feeling West Brom would test Boro's defence with balls in from wide areas, Carrick put fit-again Rav van den Berg back into the team, with Anfernee Dijksteel dropping out despite another positive showing from him in the Stoke win. In particular, while they've been so crucial for Boro of late, Riley McGree, Ben Doak and Rav van den Berg have to be of a little concern or extra monitoring given they've only recently returned from injury.

arts.ttl: Matt Clarke, Tommy Conway, Dael Fry - Boro injury update ahead of Watford
arts.sum: Clarke will be expected to return to the Boro squad for the Watford game - Boro's last before the second international break of the season. Matt Clarke and Dael Fry are back training for Middlesbrough ahead of the weekend trip to Watford, while Tommy Conway has been described as 'touch and go' to be available for the trip.
